name: zhihu
description: Zhihu Q&A search, user profiles, topic feeds, trending — page transport with cookie session via L3 adapter

dependencies.searchContent → getUserProfile: searchContent returns author url_token used by getUserProfile
dependencies.searchContent → getSimilarQuestions: searchContent returns question IDs used by getSimilarQuestions
dependencies.getUserProfile → getUserAnswers: getUserProfile returns url_token used by getUserAnswers
dependencies.getUserProfile → getUserActivities: getUserProfile returns url_token used by getUserActivities
dependencies.getUserProfile → followUser: getUserProfile returns url_token used by followUser
dependencies.getTopicIntro → getTopicFeed: getTopicIntro confirms topic_id used by getTopicFeed
dependencies.getTopicIntro → getTopicChildren: getTopicIntro confirms topic_id used by getTopicChildren
dependencies.getTopicIntro → followTopic: getTopicIntro confirms topic_id used by followTopic
dependencies.searchContent → upvoteAnswer: searchContent returns answer IDs used by upvoteAnswer
dependencies.searchContent → followQuestion: searchContent returns question IDs used by followQuestion
